name: Salmon Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salmon, beaten egg, dried parsley, instant minced onions, and dill weed together.
2. Spread the mixture onto the crescent rolls.
3. Roll up the crescent rolls from the wide end after spreading the mixture.
4. Place the rollups on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
6. Serve with a cheese sauce topping.
